data.name: Layers of Bust
data.detailed_description:
Tsukumogami

Inanimate objects that gain consciousness after a long time. It's believed that they can sometimes take human form.

ABOUT

A lonely candle suddenly inhabits a spirit: a beautiful and curvaceous woman. Stuck behind a locked door, she must find the key to unlock it.

With the ability to transform and slow down time, she uses her new body to escape the dangerous dungeon.

Layers of Bust creates a zen yet adrenaline-filled experience. RNG is constantly changing patterns and outcomes, so each time you play will be different. Slow down time and stay alive as you collect points and power-ups.

GAMEPLAY

Dodge moving pillars in this top-down, never-ending, grid-based movement experience. Watch out for the bottomless pit, collapsing ground, and secret enemies like cute ducks.

Things will start to speed up, so sometimes you gotta slow down, literally. Slow down time to survive seemingly impossible circumstances, and grab a variety of power-ups to get the upper hand.

CONTAINS

  • Cute, voluptuous girls.

  • A fun story.

  • Endless mode.

  • A large selection of outfits to wear. (And take off.)

  • Upgrades, Challenges, Achievements and more.

  • A variety of areas to play in.

  • Infinite replayability.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 Aspect Ratio or wider.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 Aspect Ratio or wider.
